title: Ferrocongregate
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ferrocongregate''' was an explosive material used in [[core bomb]]s. When combined with [[magnopium]], ferrocongregate was capable of creating a heavy blast with a wide radius.

==Appearances==
*[[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express 2|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express'' 2]] {{1stm}}
